svg.text: ⏱ GitHub Actions — Runs at 11:00 AM IST Every Day (05:30 UTC)
No human trigger needed · Silent when the week is safe · Instant dry-run preview with --dry-run
test-pipeline.yml runs a full dry-run on every push / PR to catch regressions
STEP 2 · LIVE GOVERNMENT & OPEN DATA INGESTION
Per district: fetch forecast once → group farmers by language → one AI call per language group
Season context · Crop auto-detection · CAP alerts merged · Personalised per farmer · Offline fallback
300 ms gap between Twilio calls · Retry with exponential backoff · All results logged to SQLite
🤖 Ollama (local / GitHub Actions) · Gemini free tier · Any OpenAI-compatible endpoint
Model: llama3.2:3b in CI · qwen2.5:7b locally (better multilingual) · response_format=json
● Reads 7-day forecast + IMD CAP + crop list
● Identifies risks: heatwave, rain, cold, wind
● Writes practical SMS in farmer’s language
● One LLM call per language group (efficient)
● Season-gated: runs only in relevant months
Optimal sowing window per crop + variety
kharif: May–Jul · rabi: Oct–Nov · zaid: Feb–Apr
kharif: Sep–Nov · rabi: Mar–May · zaid: May–Jun
“Harvest onion by Thu — heavy rain Friday”
Active when has_cattle = True (per farmer flag)
Main alert + Planting + Harvest + Livestock addons
All 11 Indian scripts · Any basic Android phone
Twilio WhatsApp · Meta Cloud API (1,000 free/month)
Works on any phone · No internet needed
👨‍🌾 Farmer receives the alert. Reads it. Acts. Before the weather arrives.
Right district · Right crop · Right language · Right time — no app, no English needed
Only alerted when it matters · Silence = the week ahead is safe
Hindi · Marathi · Telugu · Kannada · Punjabi · Gujarati · Bengali · Odia · Tamil · Malayalam · English
Powered by: IMD CAP RSS · Open-Meteo · data.gov.in · Ollama AI · Twilio / Meta Cloud API / Fast2SMS
Kisan Mausam Alert v2.0 — Built for India’s 140 million farming families
